chemicalDescription: Defined Cell Culture Media 8 is a cell culture phase consisting of: Arginine HCl, Calcium Chloride, Calcium Pantothenate, Choline Chloride, Cysteine HCl , Ferric Nitrate, Folic Acid, Glucose, Glutamine, Glycine, Histidine HCl, Inositol, Isoleucine, Leucine, Lysine HCl, Magnesium Sulfate, Methionine, Niacinamide, Phenylalanine, Potassium Chloride, Pyridoxine HCl, Riboflavin, Serine, Sodium Chloride, Sodium Phosphate, sodium tyrosine, Threonine, Thiamine HCl, Tryptophan, Valine.
Hydrolyzed Adansonia Digitata Seed Extract is the hydrolysate of Adansonia Digitata Seed Extract (q.v.) derived by acid, enzyme or other method of hydrolysis, Bombacaceae.

sh-Polypeptide-80 is a single chain synthetic human peptide, produced by fermentation in E. coli. The starting gene is a synthesized copy of the human gene which codes for Peroxiredoxin-2 used as such or adapted to the production host. It contains a maximum of 198 amino acids which may contain disulfide bonds and/or glycosylation. The protein consists of the proper sequence of the 20 standard amino acids.
Nonapeptide-30 is the synthetic peptide consisting of isoleucine, leucine, phenylalanine, proline, tryptophan, tyrosine, and valine.
Sequoiadendron Giganteum Bud Extract is the extract of the buds of  Sequoiadendron giganteum,  Cupressaceae.
Tetramethyl Pyrazolylpyrimidine HCl is the organic compound
Saccharomyces/Panax Ginseng Flower Ferment Extract is the extract of the product obtained by the fermentation of the flowers of Panax ginseng by the microorganism, Saccharomyces.
PEG-10 Butylene Glycol Isostearate is the polyethylene glycol derivative of Butylene Glycol Isostearate containing an average of 10 moles of ethylene oxide.

sh-Polypeptide-69 is a single chain recombinant human peptide, produced by fermentation in Pichia pastorisi. The starting gene is synthesized to be identical to the human gene which codes for Collagen Alpha-1 (III) Chain used as such or adapted to the production host. It contains a maximum of 1466 amino acids which may contain disulfide bonds and/or glycosylation. The protein consists of the proper sequence of the 20 standard amino acids.
Copper Lysinate/Prolinate is the copper salt of a mixture of Proline and Lysine

r-Bacillus Licheniformis Keratinase is a single chain recombinant Bacillus licheniformis protein produced by fermentation in E. coli. The starting gene is directly isolated from Bacillus licheniformis which codes for the enzyme, keratinase. The protein contains 379 amino acids and consists of the proper sequence of the 20 standard amino acids.
Tetrahydropyranyloxy Phenol (also known as Deoxyarbutin) is the organic compound that conforms to the formula:
Hydrolyzed Acacia Macrostachya Seed Extract is the hydrolysate of the extract of the seeds of Acacia macrostachya derived by acid, enzyme or other method of hydrolysis, Mimosaceae.
PEG-2 Caprylylamine is the organic compound.
Syzygium Australe Fruit Extract is the extract of the fruit of Syzygium australe, Myrtacea.

sh-Polypeptide-54 is a single chain synthetic human peptide, produced by fermentation in Trichoplusia ni. The starting gene is synthesized to be identical to the human gene which codes for Insulin-Like Growth Factor Binding Protein 2 used such or adapted to the production host. It contains a maximum of 325 amino acids which may contain disulfide bonds and/or glycosylation. The protein consists of the proper sequence of the 20 standard amino acids.
Citrus Junos Fruit/Sucrose Ferment Filtrate is a filtrate of the product obtained by the spontaneous fermentation of the fruit of Citrus junos and sucrose.
Coprinus Comatus (Mushroom) Powder is the powder obtained from the dried, ground mushroom, Coprinus comatus, Agaricaceae.
Citrus Iyo Fruit Water is the aqueous solution of the steam distillates obtained from the fruit of Citrus Iyo, Rutaceae.

sh-Polypeptide-77 is a single chain synthetic human peptide, produced by fermentation in E. coli. The starting gene is a synthesized copy of the human gene which codes for Glutaredoxin-1 used as such or adapted to the production host. It contains a maximum of 106 amino acids which may contain disulfide bonds and/or glycosylation. The protein consists of the proper sequence of the 20 standard amino acids.
Citrus Nobilis Peel Extract is the extract of the peel of Citrus nobilis (the accepted scientific name for Citrus nobilis is Citrus reticulata).
Sinomonas/Hyaluronic Acid Ferment Filtrate is a filtrate of the product obtained by the fermentation of Hyaluronic Acid by the microorganism, Sinomonas.
Coffea Arabica (Coffee) Fruit Powder is the powder obtained from the dried, ground fruit of Coffea arabica, Rubiaceae.
Defatted Hydrangea Macrophylla Flower is the dried, defatted flowers of Hydrangea macrophylla.
Endomyces/Bitter Cherry Juice Ferment Filtrate is the filtrate obtained from the fermentation of Prunus Cerasus Juice by the microorganism, Endomyces.

nameOfCommonIngredientsGlossary: VITIS COIGNETIAE CALLUS CULTURE CONDITIONED MEDIA
chemicalDescription: Vitis Coignetiae Callus Culture Conditioned Media is the growth media removed from cultures of the callus of Vitis Coignetiae after several days of growth, Vitaceae.
inciName: VITIS COIGNETIAE CALLUS CULTURE CONDITIONED MEDIA

chemicalDescription: SD Alcohol 38-B is ethyl alcohol denatured with one or more of the following: anethol, anise oil, bay oil (myrcia oil), benzaldehyde, bergamot oil, bitter almond oil, camphor, cedar leaf oil, chlorothymol, cinnamic aldehyde, cinnamon oil (cassia oil), citronella oil (natural), clove oil, coal tar, eucalyptol, eucalyptus oil, eugenol, guaiacol, lavender oil, menthol, methyl salicylate, mustard oil, volatile (allyl isothiocyanate), peppermint oil, phenol, phenyl salicylate (salol), pine oil, pine needle oil, dwarf, rosemary oil, safrole, sassafras oil, spearmint oil, spearmint oil (terpeneless), spike lavender oil, natural, storax, thyme oil, thymol, tolu balsam, turpentine oil, or other approved essential oils in accordance with 27CFR21
Hedychium Coronarium Powder is the powder obtained from the dried, ground whole plant, Hedychium coronarium, Zingiberaceae.
Croton Lechleri Resin is the resinous material derived from  Croton lechleri, Euphorbiaceae .

Oligopeptide-91 Dipeptide-19 sh-Polypeptide-85 Dipeptide-19 Hexapeptide-40 is a single chain synthetic fusion peptide, produced by fermentation in  E. coli.  The starting gene is synthesized by the fusion of the gene from sh-Polypeptide-85, Oligopeptide-91, Dipeptide-19, and Hexapeptide-40. The fusion peptide contains 239 amino acids and consists of the proper sequence of the 20 standard amino acids.

Pentapeptide-60 s-Methanocaldococcus Jannaschii Heptapeptide-1 is a single chain fusion peptide produced synthetically. The starting gene is synthesized by the fusion of the gene from s-Methanocaldococcus Jannaschii Heptapeptide-1 and Pentapeptide-60, The fusion peptide contains 12 amino acids which may contain disulfide bonds and/or glycosylation, and consists of the proper sequence of the 20 amino acids.
Gaultheria Fragrantissima Leaf Oil is the volatile oil obtained from the leaves of  Gaultheria fragrantissima.

Hericium Erinaceus/Lactobacillus/Leuconostoc/Hippophae Rhamnoides Leaf/Stem Ferment Filtrate is a filtrate of the product obtained by the co-fermentation of the leaves and stems of  Hippophae rhamnoides  by the microorganisms,  Hericium erinaceus, Lactobacillus  , and  Leuconostoc.
Chamaecyparis Obtusa Leaf/Root Extract is the extract obtained from the leaves and roots of  Chamaecyparis obtuse,  Cupressaceae.
Saccharina Angustata/Undaria Pinnatifida Extract is the extract of the algae,  Saccharina angustata  and  Undaria pinnatifida.
Silene Armeria/Colorata/Uniflora/Velutina/Vulgaris Extract is the extract of the whole plants: Silene armeria, Silene colorata, Silene uniflora, Silene velutina  and  Silene vulgaris.
Protea Repens Flower Nectar is the liquid collected from the flowers of  Protea repens,  Proteaceae.

nameOfCommonIngredientsGlossary: ETHYL CARBAZIDO HYALURONATE SH-OLIGOPEPTIDE-1 SH-POLYPEPTIDE-94 DIPEPTIDE-35 SH-POLYPEPTIDE-94 SH-POLYPEPTIDE-95
chemicalDescription: Ethyl Carbazido Hyaluronate sh-Oligopeptide-1 sh-Polypeptide-94 Dipeptide-35 sh-Polypeptide-94 sh-Polypeptide-95 is a single chain recombinant fusion peptide, produced by fermentation in Chinese hamster ovary cells (CHO). The starting gene is synthesized by the fusion of the gene from sh-Oligopeptide-1, sh-Polypeptide-94, Dipeptide-35, and sh-Polypeptide-95. The fusion peptide is conjugated with ethyl carbazido hyaluronate, and it consists of the proper sequence of the 20 standard amino acids.
inciName: ETHYL CARBAZIDO HYALURONATE SH-OLIGOPEPTIDE-1 SH-POLYPEPTIDE-94 DIPEPTIDE-35 SH-POLYPEPTIDE-94 SH-POLYPEPTIDE-95

chemicalDescription: Pentapeptide-49 is the synthetic peptide consisting of arginine, phenylalanine, serine and tyrosine

chemicalDescription: Methylimidazoliumpropyl p-Phenylenediamine HCl is the organic compound that conforms to the formula:
PPG-10 Lauryl Ether is the polypropylene glycol ether of lauryl alcohol

Bacillus/Monascus/Zizyphus Jujuba Fruit/Soybean Ferment Filtrate is a filtrate of the product obtained by the cofermentation of Glycine max, and the fruit of Zizyphus jujuba by the microorganisms, Bacillus and Monascus.
Copper Heptapeptide-14 Pantothenate is the copper salt of the ester formed by Pantothenic Acid and Heptapeptide-14.

chemicalName: Siloxanes and Silicones, Ph, polymers with Ph silsesquioxanes, [(methyldiphenylsilyl)oxy]-terminated
chemicalDescription: Diphenylmethylsiloxy Phenyl Methicone/Phenyl Silsesquioxane Crosspolymer is a crosslinked polymer of diphenylmethylsiloxy, phenylmethylsiloxy and phenyl silsesquioxane monomers.
Cetearamidoethyldiethonium Succinoyl Hydrolyzed Keratin is the quaternary ammonium salt formed by the reaction of cetearamidoethyl diethylamine and succinoyl hydrolyzed keratin
Acetyl Tetrapeptide-40 is the product obtained by the acetylation of Tetrapeptide-40.
Acetyl Hexapeptide-49 is the product obtained by the acetylation of Hexapeptide-49.
Arbutus Unedo Leaf Cell Extract is the extract of a culture of the leaf cells of Arbutus unedo, Ericaceae.
Uapaca Bojeri Leaf Extract is the extract of the leaves of Uapaca bojeri, Phyllathaceae.
Armeria Maritima Extract is the extract of the whole plant, Armeria maritima, Plumbaginaceae.
Luffa Cylindrica Callus Extract is the extract of the callus of Luffa cylindrica grown in culture, Cucurbitodeae.
Bacillus/Turmeric Root/Soybean Ferment Filtrate is a filtrate of the product obtained by the fermentation of Glycine max (soybean) and Curcuma Longa (Turmeric) Root by the microorganism, Bacillus.
Dimethiconyl Silicate is the product obtained by the condensation of silica and dimethyldiethoxysilane.
Sorbitol/Sebacic Acid Copolymer Behenate is a copolymer Sorbitol and Sebacic Acid esterified with Behenic Acid.

nameOfCommonIngredientsGlossary: LACTOBACILLUS/PRUNUS MUME FRUIT EXTRACT FERMENT EXTRACT FILTRATE
chemicalDescription: Lactobacillus/Prunus Mume Fruit Extract Ferment Extract Filtrate is a filtrate of an extract of the product obtained by the fermentation of Prunus Mume Fruit Extract by the microorganism, Lactobacillus.
inciName: LACTOBACILLUS/PRUNUS MUME FRUIT EXTRACT FERMENT EXTRACT FILTRATE

chemicalName: Cabbage Rose (Rosa Centifolia) Wax,Cabbage Rose Wax
chemicalDescription: Rosa Centifolia Flower Wax is a wax obtained from the flower of  Rosa centifolia,  Rosaceae.
Sambucus Nigra Wax is a wax obtained from the flowers and leaves of  Sambucus nigra, Adoxaceae.

Silkworm sh-Oligopeptide-2 is a single chain recombinant human peptide, produced by silkworm after after using either a transient expression system or transgenesis (stable insertion of a copy of a human gene into its DNA). The starting gene is synthesized to be identical to the human gene which codes for Insulin-Like Growth Factor 1. It contains a maximum of 195 amino acids, which may contain disulfide bonds and/or glycosylation. The protein consists of the proper sequence of the 20 standard amino acids.

Silkworm rh-Polypeptide-47 is a single chain recombinant human peptide, produced by silkworm after after using either a transient expression system or transgenesis (stable insertion of a copy of a human gene into its DNA). The starting gene is directly isolated from a human cell which codes for Collagen Alpha 1. It contains a maximum of 1464 amino acids, which may contain disulfide bonds and/or glycosylation. The protein consists of the proper sequence of the 20 standard amino acids.

Nematode rh-Polypeptide-47 is a single chain recombinant human peptide, produced by the nematode,  C. elegans  , after using either a transient expression system or transgenesis (stable insertion of a copy of a human gene into its DNA). The starting gene is directly isolated from a human cell which codes for Collagen Alpha 1. It contains a maximum of 1464 amino acids, which may contain disulfide bonds and/or glycosylation. The protein consists of the proper sequence of the 20 standard amino acids
Sodium Dacryopinax Spathularia/Glucose Ferment Extract is the extract of the sodium salt of the product obtained by the fermentation of glucose by the fungus,  Dacryopinax spathularia.
PEG/PPG-2000/200 Copolymer is a random copolymer produced by the reaction of an average of 2000 moles of ethylene oxide and 200 moles of propylene oxide.
Monascus/Dioscorea Japonica Root Ferment is the product obtained by the fermentation of the roots of Dioscorea japonica by the microorganism, Monascus.
Morus Alba Callus Culture Extract is the extract of a culture of the callus of Morus alba, Moraceae
Taraxacum Platycarpum Callus Culture Extract is the extract of a culture of the callus of Taraxacum platycarpum, Asteraceae

chemicalName: Beeswax absolute (RIFM),Beeswax concrete (RIFM),Beeswax, white (Apis mellifera L.) (RIFM),Bleached Beeswax,Cera Alba (EU),White Beeswax,White Wax,Yellow Wax
chemicalDescription: Beeswax is the purified wax from the honeycomb of the bee, Apis mellifera , free from all other waxes.

chemicalName: Bitter Orange Flower Wax,Bitter Orange Wax,Citrus Aurantium Amara Wax
chemicalDescription: Citrus Aurantium Amara (Bitter Orange) Flower Wax is a wax obtained from the flower of Citrus aurantium amara
Cananga Odorata Flower Wax is a wax obtained from the flower of Cananga odorata, Anonaceae. Definitions in ISO 3063
Stipa Tenacissima Wax is a wax obtained from the whole plant,  Stipa tenacissima,  Poaceae.
Citrus Nobilis (Mandarin Orange) is a plant material derived from the whole plant, Citrus nobilis, Rutaceae.
Rubus Arcticus Callus Extract is the extract of the callus of  Rubus arcticus  grown in culture,  Rosaceae.
Sea Silt Extract is the extract of Sea Silt.

rh-Rice Extract is the extract of rice,  Oryza sativa  , obtained after using either a transient expression system or transgenesis (stable insertion of a copy of a human gene into its DNA). The starting gene is directly isolated from a human cell which codes for Insulin-Like Growth Factor 1.

chemicalName: D-Glucose, reaction products with nitric acid, sodium aluminate (AlO21-) (1:1) and sodium nitrite (1:1), sodium salts
chemicalDescription: Disodium Aluminate Glucarate/Gluconate/Glycolate/Tartrate/Oxalate is a complex mixture of the mono- and disodium salts of the product obtained by the reaction of sodium aluminate with Glucaric Acid, Gluconic Acid, Glycolic Acid, Oxalic Acid and Tartaric Acid

Disodium Glucarate/Gluconate/Glucuronate/Glycolate/Ketogluconate/Oxalate/Tartrate/Tartronate is a complex mixture of the mono- and disodium salts of the product obtained by the reaction of sodium nitrite with Glucaric Acid, Gluconic Acid, Glucuronic Acid, Glycolic Acid, ketogluconic acid, Oxalic Acid, Tartaric Acid.
Dipeptide-37 is the dipeptide consisting of leucine and threonine.
Cetyl Palmitoleate is the ester of Cetyl Alcohol and palmitoleic acid.
Butter is the hydrous, semi-solid fat recovered from cow's milk.

nameOfCommonIngredientsGlossary: Lactobacillus/(Asparagus Cochinchinensis/Lycium Chinense/Ophiopogon Japonicus/Panax Ginseng/Rehmannia Glutinosa) Root/Poria Cocos Ferment Filtrate
chemicalDescription: Lactobacillus/(Asparagus Cochinchinensis/Lycium Chinense/Ophiopogon Japonicus/Panax Ginseng/Rehmannia Glutinosa) Root/Poria Cocos Ferment Filtrate is a filtrate of the product obtained by the fermentation of the roots of Asparagus cochinchinensis, Lycium chinense, Ophiopogon japonicus, Panax ginseng, Rehmannia glutinosa , and the fungus, Poria cocos by the microorganisum, Lactobacillus.
inciName: LACTOBACILLUS/(ASPARAGUS COCHINCHINENSIS/LYCIUM CHINENSE/OPHIOPOGON JAPONICUS/PANAX GINSENG/REHMANNIA GLUTINOSA) ROOT/PORIA COCOS FERMENT FILTRATE

chemicalName: Black Currant Wax,Ribes Nigrum (Black Currant) Wax,Ribes Nigrum Wax
chemicalDescription: Ribes Nigrum (Black Currant) Bud Wax is a wax obtained from the bud of  Ribes nigrum, Grossulariaceae.

chemicalName: Grape Leaf Wax,Grape Wax,Vitis Vinifera Wax
chemicalDescription: Vitis Vinifera (Grape) Leaf Wax is a wax obtained from the vine leaf of  Vitis vinifera, Vinaceae.
Polianthes Tuberosa Flower Wax is a wax obtained from the flower of Polianthes tuberosa, Asparagaceae.
Plantago Major Callus Extract is the extract of the callus of  Plantago major  grown in culture,  Plantaginaceae.
Aleurites Montanus Leaf Extract is the extract of the leaves of  Aleurites montanus,  Euphorbiaceae.
Cistus Ladaniferus Leaf/Stem Water Extract is the extract of Cistus Ladaniferus Leaf/Stem Water. The accepted scientific name for  Cistus ladaniferus  is  Cistus creticus, Rutaceae.

Hydroxydodecyl Hydroxyethyl Ethylenediamine/Methyl Acrylate Dendrimer is the multibranched polymer formed by the sequential reaction of ethylenediamine with methyl acrylate, monoethanolamine and epoxydodecane.

nameOfCommonIngredientsGlossary: ANABAENA FLOSAQUAE/APHANIZOMENON FLOSAQUAE/COELOSPHAERIUM KUETZINGIANUM/MICROCYSTIS AERUGINOSA/OSCILLATORIA PRINCEPS EXTRACT
chemicalDescription: Anabaena Flosaquae/Aphanizomenon Flosaquae/Coelosphaerium Kuetzingianum/Microcystis Aeruginosa/Oscillatoria Princeps Extract is the extract of the algae,  Anabaena flosaquae, Aphanizomenon flosaquae, Coelosphaerium kuetzingianum, Macrocytis aeruginosa  and  Oscillatoria princeps
inciName: ANABAENA FLOSAQUAE/APHANIZOMENON FLOSAQUAE/COELOSPHAERIUM KUETZINGIANUM/MICROCYSTIS AERUGINOSA/OSCILLATORIA PRINCEPS EXTRACT

chemicalDescription: Lactobacillus/Sorbus Commixta Branch Ferment Filtrate is a filtrate of the product obtained by the fermentation of the branches of Sorbus commixta  by the microorgamism, Lactobacillus.

nameOfCommonIngredientsGlossary: HUMAN UMBILICAL MESENCHYMAL STEM CELL CONDITIONED MEDIA
chemicalDescription: Human Umbilical Mesenchymal Stem Cell Conditioned Media is the growth media removed from cultures of human umbilical mesenchymal stem cells after several days of growth. The starting media is Dulbecco's Modified Eagle Medium, and may or may not contain fetal bovine serum.
inciName: HUMAN UMBILICAL MESENCHYMAL STEM CELL CONDITIONED MEDIA

chemicalDescription: Tripeptide-59 is the synthetic peptide consisting of arginine, histidine and phenylalanine.
Limonium Tetragonum Extract is the extract of the whole plant,  Limonium tetragonum, Plumbaginaceae.

Bacillus/Monascus/Aralia Cordata Root/Soybean Ferment Filtrate is a filtrate of the product obtained by the cofermentation of the roots of Aralia cordata , and Glycine max (soybean) by the microorganisms, Bacillus and Monascus
Lactobacillus Extract Filtrate is a filtrate of an extract of Lactobacillus obtained through fermentation.
Caffeoyl Tripeptide-35 is the product obtained by the reaction of Caffeic Acid and Tripeptide-35.

nameOfCommonIngredientsGlossary: (CARTHAMUS TINCTORIUS/CHAMOMILLA RECUTITA/SYZYGIUM AROMATICUM) FLOWER/(LITHOSPERMUM ERYTHRORHIZON/SOPHORA FLAVESCENS/SCUTELLARIA BAICALENSIS) ROOT EXTRACT
chemicalDescription: (Carthamus Tinctorius/Chamomilla Recutita/Syzygium Aromaticum) Flower/(Lithospermum Erythrorhizon/Sophora Flavescens/Scutellaria Baicalensis) Root Extract is the extract of the flowers of Carthamus tinctorius, Chamomilla recutita, Syzygium aromaticum and the roots of Lithospermum erythrorhizon, Sophora flavescens , and Scutellaria baicalensis
inciName: (CARTHAMUS TINCTORIUS/CHAMOMILLA RECUTITA/SYZYGIUM AROMATICUM) FLOWER/(LITHOSPERMUM ERYTHRORHIZON/SOPHORA FLAVESCENS/SCUTELLARIA BAICALENSIS) ROOT EXTRACT

chemicalDescription: Narcissus Poeticus Flower Wax is a wax obtained from the flower of  Narcissus poeticus, Amaryllidaceae.
Tripeptide-62 is the synthetic peptide consisting of aspartic acid, glutamic acid, and lysine.

Methionyl sh-Polypeptide-7 Alanyl sr-Spider Oligopeptide-1 is a single chain recombinant fusion peptide, produced by fermentation in  E. coli.  The starting gene is synthesized by the fusion of the gene from sh-Polypeptide-7, sr-Spider Oligopeptide-1 , with the initiation codes for Alanine and Methionine. The fusion peptide contains 242 amino acids which may contain disulfide bonds and/or glycosylation, and consists of the proper sequence of the 20 standard amino acids.

nameOfCommonIngredientsGlossary: ASPARAGUS OFFICINALIS MERISTEM CELL CULTURE CONDITIONED MEDIA
chemicalDescription: Asparagus Officinalis Meristem Cell Culture Conditioned Media is the growth media removed from cultures of meristem cells isolated from  Asparagus officinalis  after several days of growth.
inciName: ASPARAGUS OFFICINALIS MERISTEM CELL CULTURE CONDITIONED MEDIA

chemicalDescription: s-Centipede Oligopeptide-1 Amide is a single chain centipede protein produced synthetically to be identical to a portion of the protein, Scolopendrasin-I which is found in the centipede,  Scolopendra subspinipes mutilans.  The peptide contains 14 amino acids in which the C-terminus is an amide. Scolopendrasin-I contains a maximum of 45 amino acids consisting of the proper sequence of the 20 standard amino acids.
Undaria Pinnatifida Sporophyll Extract is the extract of the sporophyll of the alga,  Undaria pinnatifida, Alariaceae.

rh-Polypeptide-96 is a single chain recombinant human peptide produced by fermentation in  Saccharomyces.  The starting gene codes for Serum Albumin, and is synthesized in vitro from an mRNA template isolated from human liver tissue. It contains a maximum of 609 amino acids which may contain disulfide bonds and/or glycosylation. The protein consists of the proper sequence of the 20 standard amino acids.
PEG-8 Hyaluronate is the polyethylene glycol ester of Hyaluronic Acid containing an average of 8 moles of ethylene oxide.
Polyglyceryl-3 Caprate/Caprylate/Succinate is the monoester of Polyglycerin-3 with a mixture of Capric Acid, Caprylic Acid and Succinic Acid
Glucosyl Ceramide NP is the product obtained by the reaction of Glucose and Ceramide NP.
Artemisia Fukudo Extract is the extract obtained from the whole plant,  Artemisia fukudo, Compositae.
Phyllospadix Iwatensis Extract is the extract of the whole plant,  Phyllospadix iwatensis, Zosteraceae.
sh-Decapeptide-1 sh-Polypeptide-1 is a single chain synthetic fusion peptide produced by fermentation in  E.coli.
Galloyl sh-Nonapeptide-3 is the reaction product of galloyl chloride and sh-Nonapeptide-3
Palmitoyl Octapeptide-24 is the product obtained by the reaction of palmitoyl chloride and Octapeptide-25

PEG-7/PPG-2 Pentaerythrityl Tetraacrylate is the tetraester of acrylic acid with the alkyoxylated derivative of Pentaerythritol containing an average of 7 moles of ethylene oxide and 2 moles of propylene oxide.
Viper Venom is the venom collected from one or more species of the viper,  Viperidae.
Lepidium Meyenii Extract is the extract of the whole plant,  Lepidium meyenii, Brassicaceae.

Centella Asiatica/Chamomilla Recutita (Matricaria) Flower/(Camellia Sinensis/Rosmarinus Officinalis (Rosemary)/Zea Mays (Corn) Leaf)/(Glycyrrhiza Glabra (Licorice)/Polygonum Cuspidatum/Scutellaria Baicalensis Root) Extract is the extract of the whole plant,  Centella asiatica  ; the flowers of  Chamomilla recutita  (matricaria); the leaves of  Camellia sinensis, Rosmarinus officinalis  (rosemary), and  Zea mays  (corn); the roots of  Glycyrrhiza glabra  (licorice),  Polygonum cuspidatum  , and  Scutellaria baicalensis.
Copper Tripeptide-34 is the complex formed by copper with Tripeptide-34.
Acetyl Hexapeptide-8 Oligopeptide-133 is the product obtained by the acetylation of the synthetic peptide consisting of Hexapeptide-8 and Oligopeptide-133

rh-Polypeptide-104 is a single chain recombinant human peptide, produced by fermentation in E. coli. The starting gene is directly isolated from a human cell which codes for Zinc-alpha-2-glycoprotein Protein used as such or adapted to the production host. It contains a maximum of 298 amino acids which may contain disulfide bonds and/or glycosylation. The protein consists of the proper sequence of the 20 standard amino acids.
Lepista Nuda Ferment Filtrate Powder is the dried, ground powder of a filtrate of the product obtained by the fermentation of a growth media by the fungus, Lepista nuda, Tricholomataceae.
C9-11 Alkyl Glucoside is the product obtained by the condensation of C9-11 alcohols with glucose
Artemisia Annua Callus Extract is the extract of the callus of  Artemisia annua  grown in culture, Compositae
Caffeoyl Hexapeptide-65 is the product obtained by the reaction of Caffeic Acid and Hexapeptide-65
Mimosa Pudica Callus is the callus of Mimosa pudica grown in culture, Leguminosae.
Albizia Amara Seed Extract is the extract of the seeds of Albizia amara, Fabaceae.

nameOfCommonIngredientsGlossary: ASPERGILLUS/ZIZANIA LATIFOLIA LEAF/OROSTACHYS JAPONICA/SCUTELLARIA BAICALENSIS EXTRACT FERMENT FILTRATE

Orostachys Japonica/Saururus Chinensis Extract is the extract of the whole plants, Orostachys japonica and Saururus chinensis.
Artemisia Annua Meristem Cell Extract is the extract of the cultured meristem cells of Artemisia annua.Compositae
Spatholobus Suberectus Callus Extract is the extract of the callus of Spatholobus suberectus grown in culture, Fabaceae.
Heptapeptide-41 is the synthetic peptide consisting of arginine, cysteine, glycine, isoleucine, leucine and tryptophan.
Oligopeptide-151 is the synthetic peptide containing 11 amino acids consisting of alanine, arginine, aspartic acid, glutamic acid, glycine, lysine, phenylalanine and proline.
Troloxoyl Oligopeptide-143 is the product obtained by the reaction of Trolox and Oligopeptide-143.
Avena Sativa (Oat) Hull Fiber is the fiber obtained from the hulls of the oat,  Avena sativa

Polyester-32 is a polymer formed by the condensation of Glycerin, Dilinoleic Acid, Caprylyl Alcohol, Decyl Alcohol, Lauryl Alcohol, Oleyl Alcohol, Octyldodecanol, Behenyl Alcohol, Hydroxypropyldimethicone, Capric Acid, Isostearic Acid and Behenic Acid.

Aminopropyl Magnesium Polysilsesquioxane Chloride is a resinous material composed of a mixture of three-dimensional siloxane polymers and oligomers with cage structures. For the oligomers, each silicon atom in the polysilsesquioxane is connected via oxygen atoms to three other silicon atoms and can be represented by the empirical formulation RSiO3/2, where R represents the aminopropyl group. For the larger polymeric polysilsesquioxanes, some of the silicon atoms are not connected to other silicon atoms and instead have a silanol (SiOH) group. Aminopropyl Magnesium Polysilsesquioxane Chloride is prepared by the hydrolysis and condensation of 3-aminopropyltriethoxysilane, and reaction with magnesium chloride

Magnesium/Potassium/Titanium Oxide is the product obtained by the calcination of magnesium hydroxide, potassium chloride, titanium dioxide and potassium carbonate.

chemicalDescription: sh-Polypeptide-100 is a single chain recombinant human peptide, produced by fermentation in E. coli. The starting gene is a synthesized copy of the human gene which codes for Vesicle-fusing ATPase used as such or adapted to the production host. It contains a maximum of 744 amino acids which may contain disulfide bonds and/or glycosylation. The protein consists of the proper sequence of the 20 standard amino acids.

nameOfCommonIngredientsGlossary: (PANAX GINSENG MERISTEM CELL + TAXUS CUSPIDATA MERISTEM CELL CULTURE CONDITIONED MEDIA + PANAX GINSENG LEAF/ROOT/STEM POWDER) EXTRACT
chemicalDescription: (Panax Ginseng Meristem Cell + Taxus Cuspidata Meristem Cell Culture Conditioned Media + Panax Ginseng Leaf/Root/Stem Powder) Extract is the extract of the mixture of Panax Ginseng Meristem Cell, Taxus Cuspidata Meristem Cell Culture Conditioned Media dried, and the dried, ground leaves, roots and stems of Panax ginseng.

chemicalDescription: Hexapeptide-40 Methionyl sh-Polypeptide-11 is a single chain recombinant peptide, produced by fermentation in E. coli. The starting gene is synthesized by the fusion of the gene from Hexapeptide-40 and sh-Polypeptide-11 with the initiation code for methionine. The fusion peptide contains 147 amino acids which may contain disulfide bonds and/or glycosylation, and consists of the proper sequence of the 20 standard amino acids.

Bis-HEMA Poly(Propylene Glycol Adipate)/IPDI Copolymer is a urethane polymer formed by a multi-step process. First, a polyester is made by condensing Propylene Glycol and Adipic Acid, which is subsequently reacted with Isophorone Diisocyanate. The resulting polymer is end-capped with HEMA.
Dendrobium Candidum Extract is the extract of the whole plant, Dendrobium candidum, Orchidaceae (The accepted scientific name for Dendrobium candidum is Dendrobium moniliforme).
Pentasodium Tetracarboxymethyl Palmitoyl Dipeptide-12 is the pentasodium salt of Tetracarboxymethyl Palmitoyl Dipeptide-12.

Methotrexoyl Oligopeptide-59 is the product obtained by the reaction of Methotrexate and Oligopeptide-59.

Resveratrol Dimethyl Ether Maltotrioside is the product obtained by the reaction of Resveratrol Dimethyl Ether with a trimer of Maltose.
Olea Europaea Callus Culture Lysate is a lysate of a suspension of the cultured callus cells of Olea europaea, Oleaceae.

It conforms generally to the following formula, where R represents a nucleobase:

It conforms generally to the following formula, where R represents a nucleobase.
Phragmites Communis Sprout Extract is the extract of the sprouts of Phragmites communis, Poaceae. The accepted scientific name for Phragmites communis is Phragmites australis.
Mentha Piperita Flower/Leaf Oil is the volatile oil obtained from the flowers and leaves of Mentha piperita, Lamiaceae. The accepted scientific name for Mentha piperita is Mentha x piperita.
Maclura Cochinchinensis Leaf Prenylflavonoids are the prenylflavonoids isolated from the leaves of Maclura cochinchinensis, Moraceae.

chemicalName: Methacryloyloxy Ethyl Betaine/HEA/Stearyl Methacrylate/Perfluorohexylethyl Acrylate Copolymer
chemicalDescription: Polyacrylate-48 is a copolymer of methacryloyloxy ethyl betaine, 2-Hydroxyethyl Acrylate, Stearyl Methacrylate and perfluorohexylethyl acrylate.

Dioctylaminoethoxytriazine Aminopropyl Silsesquioxane Silicate is a complex inorganic polymer composed of silicate groups (SiO4/2) and silsesquioxane groups (RSiO3/2), where R represents a substituted triazine.
Sodium Acrylate/Methylstyrene/Styrene Copolymer is a copolymer of sodium acrylate, methylstyrene and styrene monomers.
Citrus Limon Fiber is the fiber obtained from the pulp of Citrus limon, Rutaceae (The accepted scientific name for Citrus limon is Citrus x limon).
Heracleum Moellendorffii Leaf Extract is the extract of the leaves of Heracleum moellendorffii, Apiaceae.
